01

Mission San Jose Archive

Construction Drawings

Construction drawing set and technical archive work for the San Jose Archive. The project documents site planning, elevations, sections, details, envelope assemblies, stair construction, and material integration.

02

Healing through Architecture

Mental Health & Community Park

A community-focused design exploring how architecture and landscape can support mental health, social connection, recreation, wellness, art, and neighborhood engagement.

03

Solar Interaction with Architecture

Cultural Art Center

A cultural art center proposal studying daylight, solar orientation, materiality, shaded circulation, and public space to create an expressive cultural environment.

04

Solidify for Saltivka

Kharkiv, Ukraine

Urban and architectural redevelopment proposal for Saltivka, focused on sustainability, transportation, commercial and residential redevelopment, community spaces, and resilient public infrastructure.

05

Professional Experience

Interior Design

Professional interior design work including concept development, detailing, material palettes, spatial experience, custom furniture, residence design, landscape-related design, and construction documentation.

06

Master Project

Interior Design - Club House Design

Club house interior design project centered on Indian intervention, cultural symbolism, material selection, spatial planning, sensory experience, and detailed interior drawings.

07

Institutional Project

Interior Design - Co-working Space

Co-working space design that combines collaborative areas, private work zones, lounge areas, material exploration, interior renderings, and sectional studies.

08

RSP Related Study Programme

Kalimpong, India

Architectural study and documentation of a monastery and regional building traditions in Kalimpong, India, including elevations, plans, details, material studies, and cultural context.
